key.name: enabled
key.description: Whether the session-user sound recognition listener is allowed to capture microphone audio. Off by default.

key.name: sounds
key.description: The allowlisted sound category ids to listen for.

key.name: sensitivity
key.description: Classifier sensitivity used by the session listener.

key.name: min-confidence
key.description: Minimum confidence required before a recognized sound can alert.

key.name: alert-sound
key.description: Whether recognized sounds should play a local alert sound. Off by default.

key.name: alert-flash
key.description: Whether recognized sounds should also drive the visual bell flash path. Off by default.

key.name: notify-in-lock-screen
key.summary: Show alerts on the lock screen
key.description: Whether Sound Recognition notifications may appear while the session is locked. Off by default.
